ferrari.SF90 Stradale: Ferrari's technological pinnacle. Plug-in hybrid with 3 electric motors and 1,000 hp. The most powerful Ferrari ever made for the road.
ferrari.SF90 XX Stradale: The extreme SF90. 1,030 hp and 430 kg of downforce. The ultimate track-focused expression of the SF90.
ferrari.LaFerrari Aperta: The ultimate Ferrari hybrid in open-top form. 210 units, 963 hp, a direct heir to Ferrari's F1 technology.
ferrari.812 Superfast: The last great front-engined naturally aspirated V12 Ferrari. 800 hp of pure, unmatched road symphony.
ferrari.812 Competizione: The 812 taken to its absolute limit. 999 extra rpm, F1-derived aerodynamics, only 999 units produced.
ferrari.Roma Spider: Italian dolce vita in open-top form. Retractable roof in 13.5 seconds, 620 hp V8, absolute Italian elegance.
ferrari.296 GTB: The future of Ferrari. 830 hp hybrid V6 biturbo, the lightest hybrid Ferrari ever built.
ferrari.296 GTS: The 296 GTB in open-top form. Retractable roof, same 830 hp hybrid V6, emotions under the open sky.
ferrari.F8 Tributo: A tribute to Ferrari's V8 biturbo legacy. Refined chassis, F1 aerodynamics, 720 hp of pure ecstasy.
ferrari.F8 Spider: The F8 Tributo in open-top form. Hard retractable roof, same 720 hp V8, sensations multiplied tenfold.
ferrari.Purosangue: Ferrari's first ever SUV. 725 hp naturally aspirated V12, 4 doors. A scandalous and magnificent revolution.
ferrari.Daytona SP3: Icona Series, 599 units. Naturally aspirated V12, homage to Ferrari's 1967 Daytona victory.
ferrari.Monza SP2: Two-seat barchetta without a windshield. 499 units, 810 hp V12, a total and radical sensory experience.
ferrari.488 Pista: The 488 in its purest form. F1 technology, 50 kg shed. The most agile V8 Ferrari of its era.
ferrari.458 Speciale: The 9,000 rpm naturally aspirated V8 in its most extreme form. One of the purest Ferraris ever made.
ferrari.F40: Every child's dream Ferrari. The first production car to break 300 km/h. An absolute icon of automotive history.
ferrari.F50: F1 technology for the road. Adapted Formula 1 V12, 349 units, one of the rarest Ferraris ever built.
ferrari.Enzo: The supercar of the Schumacher era. 399 units, 660 hp V12, direct F1 technology transfer. A pure myth.

lamborghini.Revuelto: The Aventador's successor. V12 + 3 electric motors, 1,015 hybrid hp. The evolution of the absolute myth.
lamborghini.Revuelto Opera Unica: Hand-painted Revuelto by the Ad Personam department. A one-of-a-kind piece, total automotive art.
lamborghini.Huracán Tecnica: The most refined naturally aspirated V10. Rear-wheel drive, active aero, the Huracán at its ultimate form.
lamborghini.Huracán STO: Super Trofeo Omologata: the race car for the road. 1,339 kg, GT3-homologated aerodynamics for public roads.
lamborghini.Huracán EVO RWD: The rear-wheel drive purist. Naturally aspirated V10, rear drive only. The absolute driving pleasure.
lamborghini.Urus S: The super-sport SUV. 666 hp, Lamborghini luxury, Nürburgring record for a production SUV.
lamborghini.Urus Performante: The sharpened Urus. 47 kg lighter, sportier chassis settings, the most dynamic version of the SUV.
lamborghini.Sterrato: The off-road Huracán. Raised ground clearance, the world's only proper off-road supercar.
lamborghini.Countach LPI 800: 112 units. A tribute to the 1971 Countach — the rebirth of an absolute myth.
lamborghini.Aventador LP 780-4: The last non-hybrid Aventador. 780 hp naturally aspirated V12 — an era closing with total panache.
lamborghini.Aventador SVJ: SuperVeloce Jota. Nürburgring record at 6m44. 770 hp NA V12, ALA 2.0 active aero, the ultimate Aventador.
lamborghini.Sián FKP 37: 63 units. Supercapacitor hybrid, 819 hp V12. The first hybrid Lamborghini in history.
lamborghini.Murciélago LP 670: The last Murciélago SV. 670 hp V12, manual gearbox, one of the most collectible Lamborghinis ever made.
lamborghini.Diablo SV: The Diablo in its purest form. 530 hp V12, rear-wheel drive, the definitive icon of the 90s.

bugatti.Chiron Super Sport: The world's fastest production hypercar. W16 1,600 hp, 440 km/h. 500 units for the entire planet.
bugatti.Chiron Super Sport 300+: The version that broke 300 mph. Only 30 units. Long tail bodywork engineered for pure top speed.
bugatti.Mistral Roadster: 99 units, all sold before the announcement. The last W16 roadster — farewell to a mythical era.
bugatti.Tourbillon: The Chiron's successor. Naturally aspirated V16 + hybrid, 1,800 hp. The absolute future of Bugatti.
bugatti.Bolide: Bugatti's most radical track car. W16 1,850 hp in 1,240 kg. Only 40 units produced worldwide.
bugatti.Centodieci: Only 10 units. A tribute to the legendary EB110. The rarest Bugatti of the modern era.
bugatti.Divo: 40 units. Dedicated to handling rather than top speed. The track-focused Bugatti.
bugatti.Veyron 16.4: The revolution. The first production car with 1,000 hp and 400 km/h top speed. The Veyron changed everything.
bugatti.Veyron Super Sport: World record broken at 431 km/h. 175 units, the world's fastest production car for 8 consecutive years.

mclaren.750S: 750 hp, 1,277 kg. Power-to-weight ratio is a McLaren obsession. Absolute precision on every road.
mclaren.750S Spider: The 750S with the roof off. Retractable roof in 11 seconds, same 750 hp V8. Sensations multiplied tenfold.
mclaren.Artura: The first hybrid McLaren. V6 biturbo + electric, 700 hp, 4.7L/100km in pure hybrid mode.
mclaren.Artura Spider: The Artura in open-top form. Hybrid powertrain, retractable roof, the future McLaren under the open sky.
mclaren.720S: McLaren's benchmark supercar. 720 hp V8, carbon MonoCell II chassis, breathtaking road holding.
mclaren.720S Spider: The 720S in convertible form. Retractable hard top, same performance, sensations at their absolute maximum.
mclaren.GTS: The ultimate McLaren GT. More comfort, same lightweight DNA. Built for fast long-distance journeys.
mclaren.Solus GT: 25 units. Single-seat cockpit, 25G in corners. The most intense driving experience ever produced.
mclaren.Senna: A tribute to Ayrton Senna. 500 units, 800 hp, 1,198 kg. The most radical road-going McLaren ever built.
mclaren.Senna GTR: 75 track-only units. The Senna pushed to the extreme, with 75 additional kg of downforce.
mclaren.Elva: The windshield-free roadster. 149 units, 815 hp, wind in your face. The ultimate open-air experience.
mclaren.P1: The hypercar trinity. V8 + hybrid, 916 hp, 375 units. McLaren reinvented what a supercar could be.
mclaren.P1 GTR: 58 track-only units. 1,000 hp, 132 kg of downforce. The pinnacle of McLaren in the modern era.
mclaren.F1: The most iconic car in history. 3 seats, BMW V12, 391 km/h. The absolute masterpiece of automotive engineering.

porsche.911 GT3 RS: The most extreme 911. Active PDCC aerodynamics, naturally aspirated flat-six screaming to 9,000 rpm.
porsche.911 GT3: The sporting benchmark. 9,000 rpm NA flat-six, manual gearbox available, absolute purity on the road.
porsche.911 GT2 RS: The most powerful 911 ever. 700 hp rear-wheel drive — the blonde beast from Stuttgart.
porsche.911 Turbo S: The ultimate everyday 911. 650 hp, all-wheel drive, usable in any weather and on any road.
porsche.911 Carrera GTS: The production hybrid 911. T-Hybrid system, 543 hp, efficiency and sportiness perfectly combined.
porsche.911 Dakar: The off-road 911. Raised ground clearance, Rally mode. A tribute to Porsche's 1984 Dakar victory.
porsche.Taycan Turbo GT: The fastest electric saloon in the world. 1,092 hp, 0-100 in 2.2s, Nürburgring record at 7m07.
porsche.918 Spyder: The hypercar trinity. V8 + hybrid, 887 hp. A Porsche that changed the course of automotive history.
porsche.Cayenne Turbo GT: The fastest SUV coupe at the Nürburgring. 659 hp, active aerodynamics, sports car handling.
porsche.Cayman GT4 RS: The GT3's naturally aspirated flat-six in the Cayman body. 500 hp, 1,415 kg, the ultimate mid-engine Porsche.
porsche.Panamera Turbo S: The ultimate sport saloon. 630 hp V8, 5 seats, 315 km/h. The world-reference 4-door grand tourer.

audi.R8 GT RWD: The R8's final edition. 620 hp naturally aspirated V10, rear-wheel drive only. Audi's farewell to the V10.
audi.R8 V10 Performance: The naturally aspirated V10 in its purest form. The last generation before full electrification.
audi.RS6 Avant Performance: The world's most desired estate car. 630 hp V8, quattro, 5 seats and a huge boot. Pure perfection.
audi.RS7 Performance: The sport fastback. RS6 dressed as a fastback saloon. Same 630 hp V8, sportier roofline.
audi.RS e-tron GT: The performance electric saloon. 646 hp, technology shared with the Porsche Taycan platform.
audi.RS3 Sedan: The world's only 5-cylinder sports compact. Its unmistakable guttural sound, 400 hp, absolute sports compact.
audi.RS5 Coupé: The Audi sport coupe. 450 hp V6 biturbo, quattro, elegant sporty design. An accessible grand tourer.
audi.TT RS Final Edition: The TT RS farewell. 5-cylinder, 400 hp. Iconic design since 1998 — the final edition of the coupe.
audi.Q8 RS e-tron: Audi's performance electric SUV. 598 hp, 600 km of range, comfort and performance perfectly combined.
audi.Sport Quattro: The Group B legend. 214 units, ancestor of all quattro RS models. The ultimate rally myth.

mercedes.GT 63 S E Performance: 4-door hypercar hybrid. V8 AMG + F1-derived electric motor, 843 hp. The ultimate fusion of luxury and performance.
mercedes.SL 63 AMG: The luxury roadster reinvented. 585 hp V8, 4 seats, soft-top. Classic SL DNA combined with AMG brutality.
mercedes.GT Black Series: The AMG holy grail. 730 hp, active aerodynamics, Nürburgring record. The GT in its ultimate expression.
mercedes.GT R Pro: The Green Beast. Circuit settings, active aerodynamics. The ultimate link between AMG and the Nürburgring.
mercedes.C63 S E Performance: Controversy personified. V8 replaced by a hybrid 4-cylinder making 680 hp. Better performance, endless debate.
mercedes.E63 S AMG: The family saloon that plays in supercar territory. 612 hybrid hp, 4 proper doors for everyday usability.
mercedes.EQS 53 AMG: The AMG electric grand saloon. 761 hp, 770 km of range, luxurious fastback silhouette.
mercedes.AMG ONE: Lewis Hamilton's F1 engine for the road. 275 units, direct F1 W08 technology transfer. The absolute.
mercedes.GT3 AMG: The track GT for the road. AMG Customer Racing setup, GT3-homologated aerodynamics.

bmw.M4 CSL: 1,000 units, -100 kg vs the M4. CSL = Coupe Sport Lightweight. The M4 in its purest possible state.
bmw.M4 CSL Competition: The most radical M4 Competition. M Carbon pack, refined dynamic settings, 530 hp.
bmw.M5 Touring: The world's fastest estate car. 727 hp hybrid V8, M xDrive, 5 seats and an enormous boot.
bmw.M5 Berline: The M5 in saloon form. 727 hp hybrid V8, plug-in hybrid capability. 50 km in full electric mode.
bmw.XM Label Red: The most powerful production BMW M ever made. 748 hp hybrid V8. Polarizing design, undeniable performance.
bmw.M8 Gran Coupé: The ultimate Bavarian grand tourer. 625 hp V8, 4 luxurious doors, 305 km/h. The best of both worlds.
bmw.M8 Competition Cabriolet: The M8 with the roof open. Soft-top, 625 hp V8, grand touring under the Bavarian stars.
bmw.M2 CS: The small M terror. Optional manual gearbox, rear-wheel drive, 480 hp. The purest BMW M ever made.
bmw.iX M60: The electric M SAV. 619 hp, 0-100 in 3.8s, 566 km of range. The future direction of BMW M.
bmw.M3 CS: The ultimate M3. 1,000 units, 550 hp, widespread carbon fibre use. BMW's most extreme sports saloon.

koenigsegg.Jesko Absolut: The fastest car ever designed for production. 531 km/h theoretical top speed, 9-speed LST gearbox.
koenigsegg.Jesko Attack: Track-focused Jesko. 1,400 kg of downforce at 275 km/h. The ultimate expression of absolute handling.
koenigsegg.Gemera: The 4-seat mega GT. 2,300 hybrid hp, 4 proper seats. The most insane power-to-weight ratio ever seen.
koenigsegg.CC850: 50 units for the 50th anniversary. Manual or intelligent automatic gearbox. The absolute art of Koenigsegg.
koenigsegg.Regera: No conventional gearbox. V8 + 3 electric motors, unique hydraulic coupling system. 80 units built.
koenigsegg.One:1: Megacar. 1 hp per kilogram. Only 7 units ever built. Achieved 444 km/h — an unofficial record.

pagani.Utopia: Pagani's road car. Carbon-titanium construction, mechanical watchmaking-inspired interior fully on display.
pagani.Utopia Roadster: The open-top Utopia. Only 100 units. Carbon-titanium build, the elements directly on your skin.
pagani.Huayra R Evo: 30 units. Naturally aspirated AMG V12, 900 hp, 1,050 kg. The circuit through Pagani's eyes — absolute.
pagani.Huayra BC: 20 units. A tribute to Benny Caiola, Horacio's lifelong friend. The most aerodynamic Huayra ever built.
pagani.Zonda F: The Zonda that changed everything. 650 hp V12, the Pagani myth in its most legendary state.
pagani.Zonda Barchetta: 3 units. The rarest Pagani ever made. 17.6M€ — the most expensive production car in the world.

aston.DB12: The new super tourer. 680 hp AMG V8, completely redesigned interior. The absolute sporting grand tourer.
aston.DB12 Volante: The DB12 open-top. A refined GT convertible, 680 hp V8, British elegance enjoyed under the sun.
aston.DBS 770 Ultimate: The swan song of Aston's V12. 770 hp, 499 units. The end of an era, delivered with total panache.
aston.Valkyrie: Born with Red Bull Racing F1. Cosworth V12 at 11,000 rpm, 1,155 hp, pure circuit-level downforce.
aston.Valhalla: Aston's hybrid hypercar. V8 + 3 electric motors, 1,079 hp, a direct descendant of the Valkyrie.
aston.Vantage: Aston Martin's pure sports car. 665 hp V8, rear-wheel drive, sharpened design, the most aggressive.
aston.DBX 707: Aston's most powerful SUV. 707 hp, sport chassis, the agility of a sports car in SUV packaging.

bentley.Continental GT Speed: The ultimate grand tourer. 659 hp W12, 100 km of wood veneer inside the cabin. Absolute luxury.
bentley.Continental GT Speed Convertible: The open-top grand tourer. 659 hp W12, open sky, absolute luxury in an unforgettable GT convertible.
bentley.Mulliner Batur: 18 units. The pinnacle of Bentley Mulliner craftsmanship. Each car entirely customised to absolute bespoke.
bentley.Bentayga Speed: Bentley's fastest SUV. 626 hp W12. Speed without any sacrifice of luxury or comfort.
bentley.Flying Spur Speed: The GT saloon. 626 hp W12, 5 seats, absolute interior luxury. 333 km/h in a luxury limousine.

rollsroyce.Spectre: The first fully electric Rolls-Royce. 577 hp, cathedral silence, luxury without the slightest concession.
rollsroyce.Phantom VIII: The absolute icon. V12 in 5.76m of pure serenity. Architecture of Luxury: stars integrated in the headliner.
rollsroyce.Cullinan Black Badge: The world's most luxurious SUV in its dark alter ego form. Black Badge: Rolls-Royce with zero compromise.
rollsroyce.Wraith Black Badge: The dark grand tourer. 632 hp V12, Starlight headliner with 1,340 hand-stitched illuminated stars.
rollsroyce.Dawn: The Rolls-Royce convertible. 571 hp V12, silent open sky. Absolute luxury enjoyed under the stars.

rimac.Nevera R: The fastest production car in human history. 2,107 hp, 0-100 in 1.7s. 150 units for the world.
rimac.Nevera: 23 world records broken in a single day. The original Nevera, Croatia's first electric hypercar.

maserati.MC20: Maserati's mid-engine coupe. Nettuno V6 biturbo with F1 pre-chamber combustion, 630 hp, clean design.
maserati.MC20 Cielo: Maserati's renaissance. Nettuno V6 630 hp with F1 pre-chamber, unique retractable glass roof.
maserati.Granturismo Trofeo: Maserati's grand tourer. Nettuno V6, sculptural lines, the brand's characteristically exceptional exhaust note.
maserati.Grecale Trofeo: Maserati's compact SUV. 530 hp Nettuno V6, sculptural design, the trident badge in a modern SUV.
maserati.GranCabrio Trofeo: Maserati's GT convertible. Nettuno V6, soft-top, 4 seats, Italian elegance enjoyed under the open sky.

alpine.A110 R: The A110 in its purest state. 1,082 kg, sport chassis, circuit-oriented settings for pure driving pleasure.
alpine.A110 R Turini: The A110 R Turini edition. 1,082 kg, carbon elements, circuit settings. Lightness as a philosophy.
alpine.A110 GT: The Alpine for long journeys. More comfort, same iconic lightness. Fast and precise long-distance travel.
alpine.A290 GTS: The small electric Alpine. Heir to the Clio Williams legacy, agile and fully electric without compromise.
alpine.A110 S: The sporty version of the A110. Stiffer springs, firmer anti-roll bars, 300 precise and eager horsepower.

lotus.Emira V6 First Edition: The last thermal Lotus. Supercharged Toyota V6, 1,405 kg. The Lotus philosophy in its purest state.
lotus.Emira I4: The Emira powered by the AMG 4-cylinder engine. 360 hp, more accessible entry point, same Lotus purism.
lotus.Eletre R: The hyper-performance electric SUV. 918 hp, active aerodynamics inspired directly from Formula 1.
lotus.Emeya R: The Lotus electric saloon. 905 hp, clean modern design, circuit-derived aerodynamic technology.
lotus.Evija: 130 units. The Lotus electric hypercar. 2,000 hp, Lotus's entry into the megacar era.

toyota.GR Yaris: Japan's compact pocket rocket. 280 hp 3-cylinder, GR-Four AWD, rally technology on public roads.
toyota.GR Yaris Morizo RR: The ultimate GR Yaris. 304 hp, 20 kg saved, Morizo-tuned settings. The hot hatch of every driver's dreams.
toyota.GR86: The pure driving pleasure sports car. Naturally aspirated boxer engine, rear-wheel drive, perfect balance.
toyota.GR Supra: The return of the myth. BMW I6 biturbo, rear-wheel drive, Japan's most legendary sports car bloodline reborn.
toyota.GR Corolla Morizo: The road-legal race Corolla. GR Yaris engine, Morizo edition personally signed by Toyota's CEO.

honda.NSX Type S: The NSX farewell. 600 hybrid hp, only 350 units. The swan song of Honda's legendary supercar.
honda.Civic Type R: The front-wheel drive sports compact benchmark. 329 hp, manual gearbox, Nürburgring FWD lap record holder.
honda.Integra Type S: The return of the Integra. 320 hp, manual, front-wheel drive. Type R DNA in a more elegant saloon body.
honda.S2000: The Honda icon. Naturally aspirated 4-cylinder to 9,000 rpm, rear-wheel drive. The purest engine ever made.

nissan.GT-R Nismo 2024: Godzilla in its ultimate form. 600 hp V6 biturbo, Nismo gearbox, carbon brakes. The terror of the circuit.
nissan.GT-R R35 Premium: The accessible monster. 570 hp V6 biturbo, intelligent AWD. Beats Ferraris at half their price.
nissan.Z Nismo: The Z's return in Nismo form. 445 hp V6 biturbo, rear-wheel drive. A tribute to the legendary Z lineage.
nissan.GT-R R34 V-Spec: The legendary Fast & Furious GT-R. Officially limited to 280 hp I6 RB26DETT. The stuff of pure legend.

hennessey.Venom F5 Revolution: The Texan hypercar that challenges Europeans. 1,817 hp, 484 km/h, full carbon body. America at full throttle.
hennessey.Venom F5 Roadster: The F5 roadster. 30 units, roof removed, 1,817 hp in the open air. The ultimate Texan experience.
hennessey.Venom GT: Hennessey's first world record. 435 km/h on a NASA runway in Florida. The original Texan legend.

dodge.Challenger SRT Demon 170: The most powerful production muscle car ever. 1,025 hp, 0-100 in 1.66s on E85 fuel. Road legal.
dodge.Challenger SRT Hellcat: The original Hellcat. 717 hp supercharged V8, pure American muscle car. The accessible one of the clan.
dodge.Charger Daytona SRT: The electric muscle car. Fratzonic sound system at 126 dB, iconic Charger look. The future has character.
dodge.Viper ACR: The last Viper. Naturally aspirated 8.4L V10, 645 hp, manual only. The magnificent dinosaur.

corvette.Z06: Naturally aspirated flat-plane V8 to 8,500 rpm. The American car that sounds like a Ferrari at GT prices.
corvette.ZR1: The ultimate Corvette. Flat-plane V8 + 2 turbos, 1,064 hp, 346 km/h. The absolute American supercar.
corvette.E-Ray: The hybrid all-wheel drive Corvette. LT2 V8 + front electric motor. All weather, all season capability.
corvette.Stingray: The accessible Corvette. 6.2L LT2 V8, 490 hp, revolutionary mid-engine C8 design for everyone.
corvette.C7 Z06: The C7 generation at its peak. 659 hp supercharged V8, the ultimate purist American Corvette.

brabus.Brabus 900 Rocket: 900 hp in a Mercedes-Maybach. The most powerful limousine ever built anywhere on Earth.
brabus.G V12 900: The most brutal G-Wagen ever made. 900 hp V12 biturbo in the legendary square body. Pure extravagance.
brabus.Brabus Supercar: The Brabus supercar. AMG GT base transformed into a 789 hp missile. German engineering on the race track.
brabus.Brabus 800: Based on the GT 63 AMG. 800 hp, Brabus Monoblock wheels, Masterpiece interior. Discreet power.
